app.tagline: 🛡️ Tumar.AI — your digital amulet against online scams.

home.subtitle: Your digital tumar — a personal AI amulet against online scams.
home.intro: Online scams get smarter every year — fake bank messages, phishing links, leaked passwords. **Tumar.AI** checks the danger for you and explains it in plain language. No security degree required.
home.scam_card_text: Paste a suspicious message and AI will rate how dangerous it is, spot the manipulation tricks, and tell you exactly what to do.
home.breach_card_text: Find out whether your email address appears in known data breaches — and what to do if it does.
home.password_card_text: Check whether a password has already leaked to the internet — without your password ever leaving your device unprotected.
home.how_step1:
**1. Pick a tool**  
Choose a check in the sidebar.
home.how_step2:
**2. Paste your data**  
A message, an email, or a password.
home.how_step3:
**3. Get plain advice**  
A clear verdict and simple next steps.

scam.title: 🔍 Scam Analyzer
scam.subtitle: Paste a suspicious message — email, SMS, or chat — and let AI judge it.
scam.input_placeholder: Paste the full text of the suspicious message here…
scam.input_help: The message is analyzed in memory and never stored.
scam.example_message: URGENT! Your bank card has been temporarily blocked due to suspicious activity. To restore access immediately, verify your identity here: http://secure-bank-verify-kz.com/unlock and enter the SMS code we just sent you. If you do not act within 30 minutes, your funds will be frozen.
scam.empty_warning: The message box is empty — paste a message first.
scam.not_configured: ⚙️ The AI engine is not configured on this installation. Add your Gemini API key to `.streamlit/secrets.toml` and restart the app.
scam.metric_confidence_help: How certain the AI is about this verdict. Short or ambiguous messages lower confidence.
scam.metric_urgency_help: How strongly the message pressures you to act fast, measured by our deterministic scanner.
scam.otp_warning: Never share one-time codes. Legitimate banks and services generate codes so that only you can approve an action — anyone asking you to read a code aloud or type it somewhere is taking over your account.

url_reason.shortener: shortened link that hides the real destination
url_reason.ip_address: uses a raw IP address instead of a domain name
url_reason.suspicious_tld: domain zone often used in scams
url_reason.misspelled_domain: looks like a misspelling of a popular domain
url_reason.trust_bait: uses trust words like "secure" or "verify" in the address
url_reason.misleading_subdomain: hides a familiar domain inside a different one
url_reason.punycode: uses special characters that can disguise the address
url_reason.many_hyphens: unusually many hyphens for a legitimate domain

scam.no_signals: Our deterministic scanner found no suspicious patterns — the verdict above is based on AI analysis.

breach.title: 📧 Email Breach Checker
breach.subtitle: Check whether your email address appears in known public data breaches.
breach.privacy_note: 🔒 Your email is checked in real time and never stored — no logs, no database.
breach.input_help: Checked against public breach databases; the address is never stored.
breach.empty_warning: Please enter an email address first.
breach.invalid_warning: That does not look like a valid email address — please check for typos.
breach.safe_banner: ✅ **Good news!** `{email}` was not found in any known public data breach.
breach.safe_caption: This covers publicly known breaches only — it is not a guarantee. Keep following good password habits.
breach.safe_tips_title: 🛡️ Your personal security tips for today
breach.meaning_text: Websites where this email was registered got hacked at some point, and data such as your email address — possibly along with passwords or personal details — became public. Scammers use this data for phishing and password-guessing attacks.
breach.rec_unique_passwords: Use a strong, unique password for every account.
breach.rec_password_manager: Use a password manager — it remembers strong unique passwords so you don't have to.
breach.rec_enable_mfa: Enable two-factor authentication (2FA) on your important accounts.
breach.rec_authenticator_app: Prefer an authenticator app over SMS codes for two-factor authentication.
breach.rec_recognize_phishing: Be suspicious of emails that push you to click links or open attachments urgently.
breach.rec_check_sender: Always check the sender's real address — display names are easy to fake.
breach.rec_software_updates: Install system and app updates promptly — they close the holes attackers use.
breach.rec_browser_safety: Type your bank's address yourself instead of clicking links to it from messages.
breach.rec_wifi_caution: Avoid logging into important accounts on public Wi-Fi, or use a trusted VPN.
breach.rec_recovery_settings: Review your account recovery email and phone number — outdated ones are a hidden risk.
breach.rec_account_monitoring: Turn on login alerts so you notice suspicious sign-ins immediately.
breach.rec_periodic_check: Re-check your email here every few months — new breaches surface all the time.
breach.rec_change_passwords: Change the password on every account that uses this email.
breach.rec_no_reuse: Never reuse the same password across different sites.
breach.rec_watch_phishing: Watch out for phishing emails and unexpected password-reset messages — attackers know this address exists.

password.title: 🔑 Password Health
password.subtitle: Check whether a password appears in public breach databases.
password.bullets:
- Whether the password has appeared in known data leaks
- How many times it has been seen by attackers
- Simple advice on choosing a stronger password
password.privacy: 🔒 **Privacy first:** your password is never sent anywhere in full. We use a technique that shares only a tiny anonymous fingerprint of it — the full details will be explained right here when the feature ships.

about.title: ℹ️ About Tumar.AI
about.subtitle: Your personal AI companion for a safer digital life.
about.intro: **Tumar.AI** exists for one reason: everyday people — not just security experts — deserve real protection from online scams. We turn professional security checks into simple tools anyone can use.
about.why_tumar_text: A **tumar (тұмар)** is a traditional Kazakh amulet, worn to protect its owner from harm. Tumar.AI is exactly that — a digital amulet that protects ordinary people from the dangers of the online world.
about.matters_text: Most scam victims are ordinary users, not companies. The tools that could protect them exist, but they are scattered, technical, and full of jargon. Tumar.AI puts the essential checks in one friendly place and explains every result in plain language.
about.stack_table:
| Layer | Technology |
| --- | --- |
| Language | Python |
| UI framework | Streamlit |
| AI engine | Google Gemini |
about.principles_text:
- **Privacy by design** — Tumar.AI does not store anything you type: no database, no logs.
- **Your password stays yours** — it is never sent anywhere in full (see the Password Health page).
- **Honesty** — Tumar.AI is a decision aid, not a guarantee. When in doubt, contact your bank or service provider directly through official channels.

common.coming_soon: 🚧 **{feature}** is under active development — coming soon.

errors.invalid_email: That does not look like a valid email address. Please check it and try again.
errors.timeout: The service is taking too long to respond. Please try again in a moment.
errors.unreachable: Could not reach the service. Check your internet connection and try again.
errors.rate_limited: Too many requests in a short time. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.unavailable: The service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
errors.malformed: The service returned an unexpected answer. Please try again.
errors.missing_key: The AI engine is not configured (missing API key).
errors.credentials: The AI service rejected our credentials. Please check the configured API key.
errors.model_unavailable: The AI models are unavailable for this account right now. Please contact support.
errors.service_down: The AI service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a moment.
errors.ai_error: The AI service reported an error. Please try again.
errors.unexpected_answer: The AI returned an unexpected answer. Please try again.
errors.prompt_missing: The analysis engine is misconfigured (prompt file missing). Please contact support.
